title: Ultramaster KR-106
short_description: The challenge for this round is to make a track using the Ultramaster KR-106 only.
long_description: The [Ultramaster KR-106](https://kayrock.org/kr106/) is an emulation of the famous Roland Juno 60 and 106 that was used by Enya and so many artists during the 80s and beyond.  Your challenge for this round is to **make a track using only the Ultramaster KR-106**.  You can use as many instances of the KR-106 as you wish, as well as any effect and any DAW as long as they are **free and open source**.  I forgot to add, you can also record your voice!  That way if you wish to layer hundreds of takes of your voice like Enya did, you can.  Now go compose something profound, but don't take two years like Enya, you have only a month and half!  *Happy music making!*
